Chickweed is easy to control by hand or hoe, but you have to get on it or else it becomes miniature Kudzu. Just do it now. Stop using high nitrogen fertilizer and start mulching around your plants. summary: The normally snow-covered bay was slick ice this year. Combined with winds capable of blowing sleds off the trail, that portion of this year's Iditarod caused hardships for many mushers.

title: Silencing protests of gays at funerals unconstitutional
summary: The U.S. Supreme Court says it will take up a Kansas case this fall certain to test Americans' dedication to the Constitution and the depth of our humanity; a case that could allow the worst among us to continue wrapping themselves in the law of the land to torment the grieving among us.

title: Emails show collaboration between legislator, developer on Anchorage office deal
summary: New documents in the suit challenging the Legislatures Anchorage office lease show that a lawmaker used his private email to collaborate with the developer and counter a legislative lawyer who said the deal may not comply with state law.

title: Nome, South advance to title game in South hoops tourney
summary: Nome and South won semifinal games Friday to advance to the championship game of the O'Brady's Invitational, an eight-team boys basketball tournament at South High.

title: Anchorage gets its first snow in a month
summary: Snow was falling across Anchorage early Friday for the first time in a month, leaving drivers facing a potentially slushy commute to work, said the National Weather Service.
